title: Justfile v2: modular just system (modules, LLM-first entry, single menu, sync-upstream)
description: oh-my-codex Justfile restructured 2026-07-22: root+.just/*.just modules, entry.bash human/agent detection, merged menu, ci gate renamed, sync-upstream helper. omx review: ~/tmp/omx-justfile-review.md. Deferred: rtk swallowed pnpm exec biome --write (used rtk proxy) - investigate rtk filter bug.

title: question.test.js escapes sandbox via rmux shim: splits panes in LIVE operator session, hangs ci
description: omx question CLI tests (src/cli/__tests__/question.test.ts) resolve mux binary via MUX_BINARY_CANDIDATES=["rmux","tmux"] (src/utils/platform-command.ts:251). In operator env rmux=live server shim: tests split REAL panes (leaked "Pick one 1.A/2.Other" UI into operator terminal 2026-07-22), question.test hangs (spawnSync ETIMEDOUT), runner 30min timeout cascades 57/386 file timeouts, just ci red. OMX_MUX_BINARY=tmux override did not propagate (dist build may predate; ~/.local/bin/tmux may be same shim). Fix candidates: test-scoped isolated socket, honor OMX_MUX_BINARY in question UI path, or CI-detect skip. Pre-existing; NOT caused by Justfile v2 (bead oh-my-codex-jvf).
